title: aspidosperma oblongum
intro: Aspidosperma oblongum is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Brazilian laurel or rosewood tree. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aspidosperma oblongum include its potential to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Aspidosperma oblongum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
